description.value: Aura faint evocation; CL 5th; Weight 1 lb.; Slot none; Price 750 gp DESCRIPTION This torch is made of pale yellow wood and inscribed with holy runes. When lit, it burns as a regular torch, but only lasts for 5 minutes. When held by a lawful good creature, it functions as an archon’s aura spell. The magical aura ends if a lawful good creature isn’t holding it, and resumes automatically if a lawful good creature holds it again. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, archon’s aura; Cost 375 gp
